name: Easy Halloween Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Take Ritz Crackers and make sandwich cookies out of them using peanut butter for the filling.
2. Coat each cookie in melted white chocolate, creating a "almond bark" coating without almonds.
3. Place the coated cookies on wax paper.
4. Sprinkle orange sprinkles on top of each cookie.
5. Put the cookies in the refrigerator to cool completely.
6. Store them in an air-tight container once they have set; refrigeration is no longer necessary.
